chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 427 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3454/2023 (Contempt) 16.01.2024 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner/applicant. Mr. Daim Hussain Bhanbhro, Associate of Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for alleged contemnors along with Azhar Ali Soomro, Registrar, Sukkur IBA University, Sukkur. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In compliance of order dated 31.10.2023, Registrar, Sukkur IBA University (respondent No.5) has filed compliance report through Advocate showing that in the meeting of Syndicate dated 08.09.2023 and 16.12.2023, the case of the petitioner was considered and major penalty of removal from service was endorsed. Learned Counsel for petitioner, in view of above, does not press the listed application, and submits that he would avail a proper remedy against the order of Syndicate in accordance with law. Accordingly, it is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
